'''Keyorin''', also known as the '''Hunter's World''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and known as a common destination for retired or semi-retired [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] seeking second careers as entrepreneurs or bank-rollers of those who still flew. Smugglers who decided it was time to go dirtside but couldn't bear getting out of the game sometimes ended up on this [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The most respected such retiree was typically given informal rule over Keyorin, and known as the Boss. Boss [[Tinketh Fo]] controlled the planet as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Alas, retirement rarely meant escaping from one's past indiscretions, due to the many available [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] which earned Keyorin its nickname.

Following his [[Mission to Sulon|presumed death]] on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] infochant [[8t88/Legends|8t88]] was seen on Keyorin with the head of a [[BL-series Battle Legionnaire]] droid.<ref name="Katarn">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/kylekatarnstale|series=Kyle Katarn's Tale|text=Mission 1}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Keyorin could be identified as the planet in which [[The Clone Wars: Invitation Only|''Invitation Only'']] took place by some [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] writing on a wall on the first panel that reads "KEYORIN PORT".
